title: limonium delicatulum subsp. retusum
intro: Limonium delicatulum subsp. retusum, commonly known as dwarf statice, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems due to its expectorant properties. The dwarf statice is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally to harness its medicinal properties.
